decisions.briefing: Market is neutral today — NASDAQ slipped 0.5% while S&P 500 held flat, reflecting sector rotation out of mega-cap tech into mid-cap momentum names. Cash sits at $477, just $23 below the $500 trigger for new buys, so no new positions are opened; forcing a sub-threshold trade isn't warranted. Portfolio is up 31.6% and current positions are intact — patience is the right call until cash reloads via a stop-loss, profit-take, or a sell decision.

market_education.summary_en: Markets ended mixed on Friday with the NASDAQ sliding 0.5% while the S&P 500 barely budged, a divergence driven by continued profit-taking in mega-cap tech. AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, and AMZN all traded below their 20-day moving averages with weak RSI readings, suggesting institutional rebalancing ahead of quarter-end. Meanwhile, mid-cap semiconductors and industrial tech names showed strength, with TER, UCTT, and ALGM posting volume surges and clean momentum signals.
market_education.summary_zh: 週五市場走勢分化，那斯達克指數下跌0.5%，標普500幾乎持平，主要受大型科技股持續獲利了結拖累。蘋果、微軟、輝達、亞馬遜均跌破20日均線，RSI指標偏弱，顯示機構投資者趁季末前調整倉位。相反，中型半導體及工業科技股走勢強勁，TER、UCTT、ALGM等均出現成交量放大及明確動能訊號，成為今日市場亮點。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Sector rotation is when investors shift capital from one industry group to another as the market cycle or risk appetite changes. Today's session illustrates it clearly: mega-cap tech (Apple, Microsoft, NVIDIA) is under selling pressure with RSIs below 40, while mid-cap semiconductors and industrials (TER, AYI, UCTT) are attracting fresh buying with RSIs in the 60–70 bullish zone. Spotting rotation early — before the crowd — is how active portfolios can outperform a broad index like VOO.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「板塊輪動」是指隨著市場周期或風險偏好改變，投資者將資金從一個行業板塊轉移至另一板塊的現象。今日走勢清楚呈現這一規律：蘋果、微軟、輝達等大型科技股承壓，RSI均跌破40；而中型半導體及工業股（TER、AYI、UCTT）則吸引新資金流入，RSI維持在60至70的強勢區間。能夠在市場主流意識到之前提早辨識輪動方向，正是主動選股組合得以跑贏VOO等指數基金的關鍵所在。
